savedDesignSource.purpose: Use #color-03 when converting the approved logo back to SVG later.

rules: Use the exact #color-03 actual SVG markup from n-color-types.html in the current website header.
Display it at 126px in the desktop header with the original 315:86 ratio.
Do not redraw, trace, crop, or substitute the header logo.
Keep the saved n-color-types v10 HTML unchanged for future SVG work.
Do not use the previous wordmark PNG in website headers; do not overwrite the saved HTML source.
